sourceMovie.title: The Alibi
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Alibi works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Good Girl
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Alibi clicked for you, The Good Girl (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Alibi?
faq.answer: Try The Good Girl, A California Christmas, Focus—each shares DNA with The Alibi while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Alibi?
faq.answer: The Alibi (2006) is best described as Romance, Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Alibi worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
